name: Outro
_source: s;Soromir;Well? Go on, then.{w} Kill me.|Be rid of the evil that plagues your precious land.
s;Krista;I can't do that.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Yondo needs to know the truth.|It'll be tough for everyone to take at first, but everyone needs to know.
s;Soromir;So now you decide to fight for the truth?

s;Krista;It's what Ervan wanted to begin with.{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes} And I rejected that truth.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}It's what led to this mess in the first place.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Things need to be set straight.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}You, the Talons, the Shifters{tgm}...{tgm} You all suffered for so long.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}If we work together, we can end it and start over.
s;Soromir;Hmph. Foolish girl.|{c:e;Soromir;HalfCloseEyes}It won't be that simple.

s;Krista;I know that.|But the least we can do is take things one step at a time.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}I was always taught to walk in Medea's footsteps.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}But knowing what I know now, I've got to walk my own path.{w} The path towards truth.|Yondo as a whole needs take that path too.|And we can take that first step by working together.{w} Humans and Shifters.
s;Thalia;Please, there must be some mistake!|{c:e;Thalia;NormalBlink}There's no way{tgm}...{tgm} You couldn't have{tgm}...!
s;Krista;Mother, Father, I{tgm}...{tgm} I'm sorry.|But it's true.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}I killed Ervan. And I'm prepared to take any punishment for this crime.
ending;Kai;{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};Supported the army from the sidelines until the end.

paired_ending;Kai;Trevor;{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Trevor').get_field('Epitaph')};Though hesitant at first, Kai eventually let Trevor travel alongside him since his love for the young man was too strong.{br}No one knows where the pair ended up.

paired_ending;Kai;Ryuuji;{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Ryuuji').get_field('Epitaph')};Kai joined the Wyrmfang Pirates and, together with Ryuuji, terrorized Merinas's seas. Rumors tell of the Wyrmfang ship landing on Edoyama's shores. It came and went quietly as if trying not to cause a disturbance.

paired_ending;Kai;Tsurugi;{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Kai').get_field('Tsurugi')};After the conflict, Kai went on the run, avoiding arrest by Merinese authorities. He and Tsurugi crossed paths during their travels. With some gentle convincing from Tsurugi, Kai became his hired bodyguard.
ending;Kai;{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};Kai wandered the lands, evading arrest for his treason against Merinas.{br}No one knows where he ended up.
paired_ending;Trevor;Anil;{e:u('Trevor').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Anil').get_field('Epitaph')};Trevor joined Anil in Oregot and did mercenary work together.
ending;Trevor;{e:u('Trevor').get_field('Epitaph')};Trevor, now under service of Parker, serves his new employer with unwavering loyalty. Although, he misses his days being by Krista's side.
ending;Chell;{e:u('Chell').get_field('Epitaph')};Chell stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from her wounds.
ending;Chell;{e:u('Chell').get_field('Epitaph')};Chell continued to lead the Medean Pegasus Knights. Her leadership and kindness were an inspiration to her subordinates.
ending;Sam;{e:u('Sam').get_field('Epitaph')};Sam stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from his wounds.
ending;Sam;{e:u('Sam').get_field('Epitaph')};Sam returned to Oregot to continue his quest in culling all its bandits. His reputation brought fear to the hearts of the local ruffians.
ending;Aqua;{e:u('Aqua').get_field('Epitaph')};Aqua stayed behind in Vergrande Monastery to recover from her wounds.
ending;Aqua;{e:u('Aqua').get_field('Epitaph')};Aqua stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from her wounds.
paired_ending;Aqua;Semi;{e:u('Aqua').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Semi').get_field('Epitaph')};Aqua and Semi returned to Vergrande Monestary and lived peacefully for years to come.
ending;Aqua;{e:u('Aqua').get_field('Epitaph')};Aqua returned to Vergrande Monestary to assist in rebuilding Foliaga after the fall of the archbishop.
ending;Semi;{e:u('Semi').get_field('Epitaph')};Semi stayed behind in Vergrande Monastery to recover from his wounds.
ending;Semi;{e:u('Semi').get_field('Epitaph')};Semi stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from his wounds.
ending;Semi;{e:u('Semi').get_field('Epitaph')};Semi returned to Vergrande Monestary determined to help those who suffered after the fall of the archbishop.
ending;Taylor;{e:u('Taylor').get_field('Epitaph')};Taylor stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from his wounds.
ending;Taylor;{e:u('Taylor').get_field('Epitaph')};Taylor continued to lead the Medean royal army with great pride. His tavern outings with his men continued as well.
ending;Alex;{e:u('Alex').get_field('Epitaph')};Alex stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from her wounds.

ending;Alex;{e:u('Alex').get_field('Epitaph')};Alex led the Medean royal army with her head held high for a brighter future. In her free time, she studied more about Circ in hopes of achieving a better understanding of Yondo's forgotten past.
ending;Lucy;{e:u('Lucy').get_field('Epitaph')};Lucy stayed behind in Medeas Castle to recover from her wounds.

ending;Lucy;{e:u('Lucy').get_field('Epitaph')};Lucy continued her training alongside the Medean royal army's medical division to deepen her understanding of the healing arts. She still hopes to find a cure for her ailing mother.

paired_ending;Ecco;Anil;{e:u('Ecco').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Anil').get_field('Epitaph')};Ecco and Anil returned to Oregot and continued their mercenary work together.{br}The two of them raised a child together which helped curb Ecco's spending habits.{br}At least to some degree.

ending;Ecco;{e:u('Ecco').get_field('Epitaph')};Ecco returned to Oregot and continued doing mercenary work. She often flaunted the fact that "she helped save the world" which made her services highly sought after. She lived a life of luxury from all that she earned.

paired_ending;Michael;Celeste;{e:u('Michael').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Celeste').get_field('Epitaph')};Michael resumed his Holy Knight training in Oakenfaire, and Celeste went on a journey to find her mother. After a few years, the two succeeded in both their goals and settled back in Florene Village together as a couple.

ending;Michael;{e:u('Michael').get_field('Epitaph')};Michael returned to Oakenfaire to resume his training as a Holy Knight. After a few years, he came back to Florene Village as their dedicated knight. He was celebrated as a local hero well into his adulthood.
ending;Felicity;{e:u('Felicity').get_field('Epitaph')};Felicity supported the army from the sidelines until the end.

ending;Felicity;{e:u('Felicity').get_field('Epitaph')};Although Felicity continued her maid duties for a time, she eventually disappeared without a trace. Rumors circulated of a Cat Shifter prowling around Oregot's mountains in the night, crying for a lost lover.
ending;Anna;{e:u('Anna').get_field('Epitaph')};Anna supported the army from the sidelines until the end.

paired_ending;Anna;Jake;{e:u('Anna').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Jake').get_field('Epitaph')};Anna and Jake returned to their positions on the Oregotian Council and pulled the country back up to its former glory. Both political matters and their newborn child kept them busy for years to come.

ending;Anna;{e:u('Anna').get_field('Epitaph')};Anna returned to her position on the Oregotian Council and pulled the country back up to its former glory. Despite this, rumors say that her secret shops are still in business to this day.
ending;Jake;{e:u('Jake').get_field('Epitaph')};Jake supported the army from the sidelines until the end.

ending;Jake;{e:u('Jake').get_field('Epitaph')};Jake returned to his position on the Oregotian Council and pulled the country back up to its former glory. Despite this, rumors say that his secret shops are still in business to this day.

ending;Celeste;{e:u('Celeste').get_field('Epitaph')};After the conflict, Celeste set out on a journey to find her mother. Along the way, she helped those in need. After years of searching, she and her mother were reunited and lived in peace in Florene Village.

ending;Matthew;{e:u('Matthew').get_field('Epitaph')};Matthew travelled across Yondo searching for leads on how to return home. As time went on, sightings of him became more scarce until he seemed to disappear without a trace.
ending;Parker;{e:u('Parker').get_field('Epitaph')};Parker supported the army from the sidelines until the end.
ending;Khalid;{e:u('Khalid').get_field('Epitaph')};Khalid supported the army from the sidelines until the end.
ending;Tsubaki;{e:u('Tsubaki').get_field('Epitaph')};Tsubaki supported the army from the sidelines until the end.
ending;Judah;{e:u('Judah').get_field('Epitaph')};Judah supported the army from the sidelines until the end.
ending;Shula;{e:u('Shula').get_field('Epitaph')};Shula stayed behind in Coral Village to recover from her wounds.
ending;Damien;{e:u('Damien').get_field('Epitaph')};Damien supported the army from the sidelines until the end.

ending;Damien;{e:u('Damien').get_field('Epitaph')};Though Shifters could live without fear once more, Damien chose to continue living his life in isolation. He continued to perfect his alchemical skills, though his dexterity still left a lot to be desired.

if;get_support_rank('Forrest', 'Kai') == 'A+' and (get_support_rank('Krista','Kai') != 'A+' get_support_rank('Krista','Trevor') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Sam') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Felicity') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Joshua') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Xiang') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Parker') != 'A+' or get_support_rank('Krista','Khalid') != 'A+' or get_support_rank('Krista','Masashi') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Hikaru') != 'S' or get_support_rank('Krista','Torgen') != 'A+' or get_support_rank('Krista','Matthew') != 'S')

paired_ending;Forrest;Torgen;{e:u('Forrest').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Torgen').get_field('Epitaph')};Rumors have circulated that despite Krista no longer being present at the castle, a certain Griffon rider could be seen visiting a certain general's chambers each month on quiet evenings.

elif;get_support_rank('Krista','Kai') != 'A+' get_support_rank('Krista','Trevor') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Sam') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Felicity') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Joshua') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Xiang') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Parker') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Khalid') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Masashi') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Hikaru') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Torgen') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Matthew') != 'S'
ending;Forrest;{e:u('Forrest').get_field('Epitaph')};Forrest joined Krista in her exile and stayed by her side until the end of his days. The two of them raised a son together.

ending;Forrest;{e:u('Forrest').get_field('Epitaph')};Forrest stayed under the service of the Medean royal family for the rest of his days. His heart felt hollow without Krista by his side. This emptiness weighed heavily both on himself and those around him.

paired_ending;Krista;Forrest;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Forrest').get_field('Epitaph')};Forrest joined Krista in her exile and settled in the countryside of the island of Valona. There, the two wed and raised a son together.

paired_ending;Krista;Kai;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};After Krista's exile, Kai escaped to Valona to evade Merinese authorities and to fulfill his promise to her. The two settled in the island's countryside and raised a son together.

elif;get_support_rank('Forrest', 'Kai') == 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Trevor') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Sam') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Felicity') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Joshua') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Xiang') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Parker') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Khalid') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Masashi') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Hikaru') != 'S' and get_support_rank('Krista','Torgen') != 'A+' and get_support_rank('Krista','Matthew') != 'S'

paired_ending;Forrest;Kai;{e:u('Forrest').get_field('Epitaph')};{e:u('Kai').get_field('Epitaph')};Upon Forrest's insistence, the two of them followed Krista to Valona where she was exiled. The three of them peacefully lived together in the countryside.

ending;Krista;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};Krista was exiled to the island of Valona for her crimes. Deciding that Yondo was no longer home for them, Forrest and Kai followed her. The three of them lived the rest of their lives in peace and raised a son together.
elif;get_support_rank('Forrest','Chell') == 'S' or get_support_rank('Forrest','Alex') == 'S' or get_support_rank('Forrest','Marina') == 'S' or get_support_rank('Forrest','Reem') == 'S'

ending;Krista;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};Krista was exiled to the island of Valona for her crimes. She lived her life in peace and married a local village man there. The two of them raised a son together.
# Krista unpaired, Forrest unpaired, and BSFE Girl event seen

paired_ending;Krista;BSFE;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};B., Common Commoner;Krista snuck back into Medeas territory to fulfill her promise to a certain woman in{br}Port Gildress. The two of them lived the rest of their lives in Valona and raised a son together.

ending;Krista;{e:u('Krista').get_field('Epitaph')};Krista was exiled to the island of Valona for her crimes. Together with Forrest, she lived peacefully in the countryside. The two of them raised a son together.
# Ervan's ending (if Krista dealt the final blow on him)

ending;Ervan;{e:u('Ervan').get_field('Epitaph')};Knowing that the truth had set his beloved Krista free, Ervan was no longer filled with hatred. Hope for a new, reborn Yondo comforted him in his dying moments.
